sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11511" key="a)parguro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαργῠρ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n11511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπαργυρίζω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
